rationale: The plan rigorously satisfies all normative constraints and requirements set forth by the TELOS authorization council. The architectural invariant 'WebGL is paint' is correctly enforced through an XState machine and a genuine semantic DOM layer, ensuring accessibility is deeply structural rather than 'free'. The two-blade gate mechanism correctly partitions the deterministic, fully testable functional requirements (with explicit Playwright closed-inventory coverage and pinned numeric performance budgets) from the subjective human aesthetic judgment. The evidence ledger strictly adheres to the fail-closed, full-40-hex sha allowlist model, preventing any unverified claims from passing the build. The plan is mature, highly deterministic, and implementation-ready.
